page.title: AI SETUP
page.subtitle: Train your AI assistant to understand your business
page.comingSoonDesc: AI-powered email drafting and business intelligence is in development. Request early access below.
intro.title: MEET YOUR AI ASSISTANT
intro.description: Your AI assistant learns your business — services, pricing, communication style, and team structure. Once trained, it can draft emails that sound like you, with accurate pricing and context.
intro.bullet1: Learns your writing style from example emails
intro.bullet2: Understands your services, pricing, and payment terms
intro.bullet3: Knows your team and who handles what
intro.bullet4: Drafts emails with accurate business context
interview.title: BUSINESS INTERVIEW
interview.q1: What services does your company offer? For example: decking, railing, fencing, roofing, painting, etc.
interview.q2: What's your primary service area? Where do you typically work?
interview.q3: What materials do you commonly use? For example: cedar, composite, aluminum, pressure-treated lumber, etc.
interview.q4: What are your typical price ranges? For example, what do you charge per linear foot for railing, or per square foot for decking?
interview.q5: Do you have standard rates or do you custom-quote everything?
interview.q6: What are your standard payment terms? For example: 50/50, NET-30, deposit + final, etc.
interview.q7: How would you describe your communication style with clients? Formal? Casual? Direct? Somewhere in between?
interview.q8: Could you paste 2-3 example emails you've sent to clients that represent your typical style? This helps me learn how you write.
interview.q9: Any phrases you always use or never use? Words or expressions that are part of your brand — or that you avoid?
interview.q10: What's your typical response time to client inquiries?
interview.q11: Are there services you DON'T offer that people commonly ask about?
interview.q12: Any seasonal patterns? When's your busy season vs slow season?
interview.q13: Who's on your team? What does each person handle?
interview.q14: Are there topics that only certain people should respond to?
interview.summary.title: SUMMARY
interview.summary.description: Here's what I've learned about your business. Review and confirm.
